---
execute: 
  cache: true
params:
  refreshdata: FALSE
---

```{r initializing}
#| include: false
#| cache: false

refreshData <- params$refreshdata
if (exists("startrun")) {
  print(fortunes::fortune())
} else {
  source(here::here("Scripts","StartHere.r"))
}
if (exists("fxsVars")) {
  print(fortunes::fortune())
} else {
  source(here::here("scripts","fxsAndVars.R"))
}
source(here::here("scripts","defineColors.R"))

```

# Overview

## Column {.tabset}

### Overview of this product

This dashboard is currently under construction. Please check back soon!

This dashboard shows data primarily from the 2020 Decennial Census and 2020 American Community Survey. For a description of the data and sources, please see the "Data" Tab.

### Shiny App
